programme.title: Planet Earth: Mammals
programme.desc: Going behind the scenes to discover the making.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mammals
programme.desc: By pushing themselves and their bodies to the absolute limit, mammals like the camel, echidna, and vampire bat have found remarkable ways to beat the heat, surviving in some of the hottest places on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mammals
programme.desc: From freshwater jungle ponds to the dark depths of the open ocean, air breathing mammals have found ways to overcome the challenges of a life in water.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mammals
programme.desc: Mammals have mastered every environment on Earth, but today the planet is changing rapidly, thanks to one mammal in particular; as humans reshape the planet, mammals must change with it and find surprising ways to survive this new wild.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mammals
programme.desc: From ice covered seas to snow-capped mountains, mammals have conquered the cold, living in the most inhospitable places on Earth thanks to their intelligence and adaptations.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mammals
programme.desc: With heightened senses verging on superpowers, over two thirds of mammal species are creatures of the night with some even returning to the dark side as their daytime world gets more and more crowded.

programme.title: The Professional
programme.desc: An Italian hit man (Jean Reno) in New York risks his life to protect an orphan girl (Natalie Portman) who captures his heart.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An FBI agent (Keanu Reeves) turns California surfer to nab bank robbers who wear rubber masks of four ex-presidents.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: Green Beret veteran Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) takes on a Pacific Northwest sheriff (Brian Dennehy) and the National Guard.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: A former Green Beret goes on a reconnaissance mission to spring MIAs from a Viet Cong prison.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Former Special Forces agent John Rambo blasts through Soviet-occupied Afghanistan in search of his captive mentor.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a Marine is found beaten to death in his backyard.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While investigating a naval commander's death, the team undergoes required psych evaluations.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a suicide bomber tries to assassinate the Belgravian Defense minister, the team must protect his daughter, who is studying in the U.S.; Gibbs looks into the death of a Marine who was killed in the bombing.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A murdered Marine's fingertips and teeth are found in a stolen purse.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a former investigative assistant connects to a crew planning to rob a woman's warehouse; a new special agent (Sarah Jane Morris) arrives at the office.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is suspicious when Vance asks him to interrogate a teenage boy accused of killing his retired Marine father.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Touring the mightiest mountain ranges.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: Africa is home to the greatest collection of wildlife on Earth, with a vast tropical rainforest full of life at its heart, but animals face big challenges in this land of plenty.

programme.title: Marked for Death
programme.desc: A former drug agent (Steven Seagal) and his old Army buddy (Keith David) exterminate a so-called Jamaican drug posse.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: Green Beret veteran Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) takes on a Pacific Northwest sheriff (Brian Dennehy) and the National Guard.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: A former Green Beret goes on a reconnaissance mission to spring MIAs from a Viet Cong prison.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Former Special Forces agent John Rambo blasts through Soviet-occupied Afghanistan in search of his captive mentor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives feel a woman is withholding information when they probe the murder of her wealthy husband and very young daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Evidence points Detectives Briscoe and Curtis in the direction of a fascist youth gathering after the brutal beating and murder of a high-school girl.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A shooting sends police divers into the Hudson River where they find a VW bus linked to a murder case closed in the 1960s during student uprisings.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a parolee's corpse in a car trunk sends detectives after a suspect that bounty hunters also want, dead or alive.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis probe the murder of a popular Harlem community leader; McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a corpse in Battery Park reunites squads when the victim turns out to be a Baltimore official. (Concluding on

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a girl who managed to die, unnoticed, amid the hustle and bustle of an ER's waiting room.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a possible homicide while probing the assault of a retired divorce attorney.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a police officer who was shot while on an undercover stakeout.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the shooting of an investigative reporter to a sensationalized murder case, closed 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Family secrets unravel when detectives look for motives for a college professor being thrown into the path of a subway train.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a corporate mogul's death, caused by an overdose of a drug that enhances sexual performance.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When the murder of an audio-system installer links to the mob, McCoy's office must ensure witnesses' safety.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: FOX & Friends First
programme.desc: Hosts Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus present all the headlines viewers may have missed overnight, along with a preview of upcoming news events.

programme.title: Censored! Losing Our First Freedoms
programme.desc: The influence of Big Tech, progressives and anti-American global force on open discussion, honest debate and truth in America.

programme.title: First Edition
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: News Now
programme.desc: Host Shannon Cake brings you live reporting, global field updates and insight-rich interviews shaping the day's high-stakes stories.

programme.title: National Update
programme.desc: Live national headlines, expert interviews and insight into the stories shaping America.

programme.title: John Bachman Now
programme.desc: John Bachman tackles big news from DC, NY and around America.

programme.title: National Desk
programme.desc: Bringing breaking news, investigative reports, and political coverage.

programme.title: Newswire
programme.desc: Up-to-the-minute news updates, in-depth analysis, exclusive interviews and a fresh perspective on the day's top stories and key developments in breaking news, politics and current events.

programme.title: Ike Wingate America
programme.desc: Ike Wingate is a straight shooter who takes the complex stories of the day and lays them out logically and sensibly, making sense of the news.

programme.title: The Todd Starnes Show
programme.desc: Todd Starnes delivers breaking news and commentary covering politics, faith, and culture.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: America's Mayor Live
programme.desc: Former NY Mayor Rudy Giuliani gives insight on leadership, courage and the most pressing issues of our time.

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms.

programme.title: Rob Carson's What in the World?
programme.desc: Rob Carson dissects politics, cultural phenomena and the absurdity confronting America with humor and satire.

programme.title: Stand Up Trump: Making America Fun Again
programme.desc: As Donald J. Trump began his presidency, it quickly became clear to everyone this was going to be very different from any administration in history.

programme.title: Faithkeepers
programme.desc: Christians, Bahá'í, Yazidis, Jews, and other minority refugees give testimony on their persecution in the Middle East.

programme.title: Day of Days: June 6, 1944 - American Soldiers Remember D-Day
programme.desc: Documentary commemorating the 70th anniversary of the Normandy landings by bringing together American D-Day veterans to share their experiences of that fateful day.

programme.title: Doolittle's Raiders: A Final Toast
programme.desc: The surviving members of Doolittle's Raiders -- the flyers who took part in the April 18, 1942, raid on Japan -- hold their final toast.

programme.desc: Michael Savage delivers his insights on politics, culture, faith and more as he seeks to save western civilization.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: An intense look into the unpredictable nature of traffic stops and the challenges officers face as they balance maintaining order with responding to unforeseen chaos.

programme.title: Bolling!
programme.desc: RAV host Eric Bolling hosts weekdays for an honest, unfiltered take on the issues shaping America's future.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Join hosts Steve and Ivie Gruber as they get your day started.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Where are you placing your trust? Today, Joyce explains how faith, gratitude and relying on God can change your everyday life.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.desc: Dr. Jeremiah shares about the longevity of life throughout history and during the Millennium.

programme.title: Joseph Prince

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Advice for success in life from the book of Proverbs.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Feeling stuck or overlooked? Today, Joyce shares how staying patient, faithful and content can help you handle life's challenges well.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Recognizing one's identity in Christ.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Feeling stuck or overlooked? Today, Joyce shares how staying patient, faithful and content can help you handle life's challenges well.

programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Harvest With Pastor Greg Laurie
programme.desc: Join Pastor Greg Laurie for a time of encouragement, worship and Bible study.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: See Jesus in the Old Testament through types, shadows and Bible stories explained.

programme.title: Charlie Kirk Today
programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Allen Jackson NOW
programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Dr. O.S. Hawkins sits down with Israeli President Isaac Herzog and U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee to discuss Israel's history, the enduring U.S.-Israel alliance, regional security, and the hope for lasting peace.

programme.title: The Rosenberg Report
programme.desc: Joel C. Rosenberg is a respected geopolitical expert on the Middle East. Each week, he offers a close-up view of current events and issues in this volatile region, bringing important insights and biblical perspective.

programme.title: Boots on the Ground
programme.desc: Factual in-depth information about the ongoing war, providing viewers with clear insight into tactical maneuvers and key military events.

programme.title: Ancient Nutrition
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Jordan Rubin.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Charlie Kirk Today
programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: While we cannot know the day or hour of Christ's return, we can know it's close by the signs given in the Bible. God's Word not only tells us approximately when Jesus will return; it also tells us how. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: The Rosenberg Report
programme.desc: Joel C. Rosenberg is a respected geopolitical expert on the Middle East. Each week, he offers a close-up view of current events and issues in this volatile region, bringing important insights and biblical perspective.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie welcome author and activist David Barton for a discussion on America's biblical heritage, civic engagement, and the role of Christians in shaping their communities.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.desc: James Robison was a former preacher who changed directions in his life and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people.

programme.title: Ancient Nutrition
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Jordan Rubin.

programme.title: Taking Care of Business
programme.desc: Examining whether the teaching and learning techniques of the 20th century work in the high-tech 21st century.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: In Empty Out the Negative, Joel Osteen provides us with biblical tools to combat negative thoughts and feelings that weigh us down so that we can have the abundant life that we were meant to live.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Trying to do everything on your own? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to trust God more and stop living frustrated and worn out.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.
